author: James
name: UT7 delta-residual + RLMA-rank320 no-TTT q8
evidence_scope: two 1xH100 seed runs plus one cap-hardening seed; no 8xH100 10-minute leaderboard claim
blurb: Universal Transformer style shared block with scaled residual delta updates and rank320 Random Linear Map Adapters. TTT was tested and rejected for this candidate. Submitted as a non-record unlimited-compute research package under the 16,000,000 byte artifact cap.
technique_summary: 7-pass UT (input + 6 shared iters + output) with delta-scaled residual update (UT_RESIDUAL_DELTA=1, BRANCH_SCALE_INIT=0.6), RLMA rank 320 with int8 GPTQ (clip_k 12.85) over a deterministic blake2b-keyed random base, no TTT, tied int8 embeddings, fp16 scalar passthrough, zstd-22 compression
selected_clip_reason: best bpb in rank320 q8 cap-hardening sweep while preserving headroom under the decimal 16,000,000 byte cap

quantization.R_random_projections: not stored; regenerated from blake2b(layer_name) ^ k_iter

progress_roadmap: 04-26 UT6+RLMA64+TTT3 produced a three-seed 8xH100 forensic package at 1.43101541 +/- 0.002668 bpb.
That package exposed a warmdown bug: iteration-limited runs never decayed and kept lr_scale at 1.000.
The clean follow-up fixed warmdown and pivoted away from TTT after direct ablations hurt quality and speed.
UT7 switched the recurrent update to a scaled residual delta and improved available 1xH100 evidence into the 1.29 bpb range.
RLMA-rank320 q8 with GPTQ_CLIP_K=12.85 is the selected cap-hardened candidate.
grant_or_more_time_plan: Run seeds 42, 314, and 999 on 8xH100 or equivalent hardware for 3-4 hours per seed.
Report exact final_quant_roundtrip metrics, artifacts, byte totals, and full logs for each seed.
Use full validation coverage for the final package while keeping validation data inaccessible during training.
Only sweep rank, clip, and iteration count after seed 42 passes artifact and roundtrip gates.
notes: Not competitive with the current 10-minute SOTA (~1.06 val_bpb). Submitted to track_non_record_16mb for the architecture (UT delta-residual + deterministic random-base RLMA), the directly ablated TTT negative result, and the cap-hardening discipline. The full chronological roadmap (UT6 RLMA64+TTT3 -> UT6 RLMA128+TTT clean -> UT6 RLMA256 noTTT -> UT7 delta-residual) is documented in README.md so other contributors can extend or fix it.

attribution.parameter_golf_upstream_baseline: Root train_gpt.py and Runpod template y5cejece4j; Muon optimizer split, RMSNorm forward, FineWeb dataset wrappers, GPTQ recipe.
attribution.modded_nanogpt: Keller Jordan and contributors. Muon, Polar Express NS coefficients, bf16-forward / fp32-master pattern. See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.
attribution.universal_transformer: Dehghani et al., 2018. K-iteration shared-block structure. This submission uses fixed K=6, no Adaptive Computation Time.
attribution.gptq_std_clip: Frantar et al., 2022. The std-clip GPTQ recipe with clip_k parameterization is borrowed from upstream record PR #1394 (records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-25_ValCalib_GPTQ_XSA_BigramHash3072).
attribution.lineage_predecessor_in_repo: records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-04-26_UT6_RLMA64_TTT3_4hour/ (3-seed val_bpb=1.43101 +/- 0.00267 on 8xH100; UT + RLMA + TTT-Linear chunk-wise dual form). UT7 is the warmdown-fixed, residual-fixed, no-TTT successor.
